seo.title: Iyarkai'n Aura — Handmade Natural Skincare & Hair Care
seo.description: Iyarkai'n Aura — handmade, 100% natural face creams, herbal hair oils & gels. Chemical-free, cruelty-free, crafted in small batches. Unpack your radiant look.

announcement.text: Handmade in small batches — 100% natural, paraben & cruelty free.

hero.subheading: Handcrafted face creams, herbal hair oils & gels made in small batches from real botanical ingredients — rose, saffron, sandalwood, almond, aloe vera and alkanet root. No parabens, no chemicals, no shortcuts.
hero.imageAlt: Iyarkai'n Aura handmade face cream jars — Rose, Sandal, Almond, Saffron and Aloe Vera — arranged outdoors on a rock

productsSection.heading: Handpicked Naturals
productsSection.lead: Every jar and bottle is handcrafted in small batches — enriched with real botanical extracts for visible, gentle results.
productsSection.footnote: Prices shown are MRP-inclusive retail prices. Bulk & gifting orders welcome — get in touch for a custom quote.

whyUs.heading: Real Ingredients. Real Results.
whyUs.lead: Every product is handcrafted in small batches with ingredients you can actually pronounce — no fillers, no shortcuts.
whyUs.imageAlt: Iyarkai'n Aura herbal hair oil bottle surrounded by natural botanical ingredients

features.title: Handmade With Love
features.description: Small-batch crafted, never mass-produced — care in every jar.

features.title: 100% Natural
features.description: Rose, saffron, sandalwood, almond, aloe vera & alkanet root — nothing artificial.

features.title: Chemical Free
features.description: Paraben free, sulfate free & gentle enough for daily use.

features.title: Cruelty Free
features.description: Never tested on animals — kind to you and to nature.

features.title: Suits All Skin & Hair Types
features.description: Gentle formulas designed for everyday use, for men and women.

features.title: Visible, Gentle Results
features.description: Reduces hair fall, nourishes scalp & brightens skin — naturally.

brandStory.heading: Crafted By Hand, Rooted In Nature
paragraphs: Iyarkai’n Aura began with a simple belief — that skincare and haircare should be as pure as the ingredients nature already gives us. Every cream and every bottle of oil is still mixed, poured and labelled by hand, in small batches, by MK Handicrafts.
No mass production. No shortcuts. Just real botanical extracts — rose, sandalwood, saffron, almond, aloe vera and alkanet root — blended the way our grandmothers would have trusted.
When you unpack an Iyarkai’n Aura jar, you’re not just getting a product. You’re getting care, craft and nature, bottled with love.
brandStory.imageAlt: Iyarkai'n Aura full product collection displayed on a wooden shelf — face creams, hair oils and gels
